query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_recipes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != '' THEN 1 END) as with_image,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" IS NULL OR "imageUrl" = '' THEN 1 END) as no_image,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE '%placeholder%' THEN 1 END) as placeholder_images,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 1 END) as cloudfront_images,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE '%unsplash%' THEN 1 END) as unsplash_images,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE '%pexels%' THEN 1 END) as pexels_images,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE '%manus%' OR "imageUrl" LIKE '%forge%' THEN 1 END) as ai_generated_images
FROM recipes;
